acknowledgment.professional: Thank you for your email. I have received your message and will review it shortly.
acknowledgment.casual: Got it! Thanks for sending this over. I'll take a look soon.
acknowledgment.friendly: Hi! Thanks so much for reaching out. I'll circle back shortly!

meeting_accept.professional: Thank you for the invitation. I'm available at the proposed time and will attend.
meeting_accept.casual: Sounds good! I'm free then. See you there.
meeting_accept.friendly: That works perfectly for me! Looking forward to it!

meeting_decline.professional: Thank you for the invitation. Unfortunately, I have a scheduling conflict. Could we reschedule?
meeting_decline.casual: Sorry, I can't make that time. Can we find another slot?
meeting_decline.friendly: Oh no, I wish I could make it! Could we find another time that works?

follow_up.professional: I wanted to follow up on my previous email. I'd appreciate an update when convenient.
follow_up.casual: Hey, just checking in. Any updates?
follow_up.friendly: Hi! Just wanted to gently bump this. No rush at all!

thank_you.professional: Thank you for your assistance. Your help has been invaluable.
thank_you.casual: Thanks a lot for helping out! Really appreciate it.
thank_you.friendly: You're amazing! Thank you so much!

information_request.professional: I'm writing to request additional information regarding this matter.
information_request.casual: Quick question - could you clarify this for me?
information_request.friendly: Hey! I was wondering if you could help me understand this better.

deadline_extension.professional: I'm writing to request an extension. I would need additional time to deliver quality work.
deadline_extension.casual: Would it be possible to push the deadline? Let me know if that works.
deadline_extension.friendly: I hate to ask, but would it be possible to get a little more time on this?

out_of_office.professional: I am currently out of the office with limited access to email. For urgent matters, please contact my team.
out_of_office.casual: I'm out of office. For anything urgent, reach out to the team.
out_of_office.friendly: Thanks for your message! I'm currently away but will get back to you soon!
